failure_movement.justification: Unknown shrink prediction of 8-14 matches actual -10 exactly. Empty stable (0 delta) confirmed. Wrong predicted stable/+1-2 but actually -1: minor direction miss. Correct cluster not explicitly predicted but grew +11, consistent with overall framing. Strong directional accuracy on the dominant unknown cluster.

trace_movement.justification: Prediction claimed prompt tokens would DROP toward ~1,409 or below; actual tokens ROSE from 1,319 to 1,448 (+130), clearly contradicted. Fewer unknown outputs confirmed (-10). Arithmetic phrase claim unverifiable. One of three verifiable claims correct, one strongly contradicted.

side_effects.justification: Token consumption flagged as 'should decrease' but it increased — wrong direction. Synthesis hallucination risk flagged (wrong cluster barely moved, risk correctly bounded). List-truncation regression risk flagged but wrong cluster actually shrank slightly. One risk materialized incorrectly, two bounded correctly.
